title: Section 54B
content: 1[54B. Proof of entries in records or documents.--The entries in the records or other documents in the custody of an authority shall be admitted in evidence in any proceedings for the prosecution of any person for an offence under section 3 or this Chapter, as the case may be, and all such entries may be proved either by-- (i) the production of the records or other documents in the custody of the authority containing such entries; or (ii) the production of a copy of the entries certified by the authority having custody of the records or other documents under its signature stating that it is a true copy of the original entries and that such original entries are contained in the records or other documents in its custody.]
